titleStmt.title: SII 20.126: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 126. (B.K. No. 84 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone set up near the temple of Sōmaliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated in the regnal year 4 of Tribhuvanamalla Vī0ra-Sōmēśvara, Parābhava, Chaitra s11u 8, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1186, March 30. The weekday was, however, Sunday.
It commemorates the death of the hero Saṅkeya-sāhaṇi, a servant of Mādiseṭṭi, in a fight at Kundugoḷa, when Mādiseṭṭi raided the latter fort.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastavastuvistīrnnaghūrnnitārnnavavaḷāvaḷayitavasundharāvaḷayasakaḷa vēḷāmarapaṭṭaṇādhiṣṭhāyakanuṁ vaṁdibriṁdapradāya
kanuṁ satyavākyāmōghasāyakanumappa śrīmaccaladaṁkarāma mādiseṭṭiyaru kalukeṟeya paṭṭaṇadoḷu sukhasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiraloṁdu devasaṁ . vri . Aṟesaṟi tōragalu kavaṇigalu kaṇi bhaṁḍiya gāli kelle heggoṟaduṟi yeṇnekāyda
maṇalaggeda ḍhēṁkaṇe duṁduvaṁ tuṟugi hodaḷdu tōrppa mugilaṭṭaḷeyiṁ giḍigaṁgaḷiṁ bhayaṁkaramenisirdda kuṁdugoḷamaṁ mugilaṁ tuḍukuttami
rppudaṁ . va . Antu siḍibaleyu siḍilēḷgeyumippaṁtirdda kuṁdugoḷada kaligo ḍage kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ kāmadēvanettaluttavaḷanāgippuduṁ cala
daṁkarāma mādiseṭṭi tānuṁ taṁna samastasāmagrisahitaṁ bandā durggamaṁ mūvaḷa sāge sutti mutti mahālagge māḷpuduṁ . vuṟade sari
gēṟe hāydanegeṟagiṟagiḍe giḷiyaṁte taneyanēṟi bhaṭarbbobbiṟiye pagevaḍeyaneṁtatta ṟadaṟidanō śauryaśūdru
kāṁkaṁ saṁkanu . vri . Adiradidircci sārccidara haṁdaleyaṁ harideydi hoydu tāgida subhaṭāḷiyaṁ piḍidu
sauḷane sīḻduṟadāṁta bīraraḷimiduḷudirvvannavappaḷisi saṁgaradoḷu caladaṁkarāmanaggada hanmananāṁtiṟi

© danājinājibhayaṁkaranappa saṁkaranu . tuṟugida kaṇegaḷa kakkaḍeduṟugalabagideṟasu giva huṁgaḷa bā
yidoṟeduguva nettariṁ hūtoṟagi baṁdugevoloṟagidaṁ kali saṁkanu . Ā prastāva doḷu . kaṁ .
mecce bhaṭakōṭi birudaru biccaḷise surarkkaḷosedu hūvina maḷeyiṁ mucce saṁkarana noldaccaraseyaru
ydaremage tamageṁdāgaḷu . jitēna labhyatē lakṣī mritēnāpi surāṁganā kṣaṇavidhva ṁsani kāyē kā cintā mara
ṇē raṇē . svasti śrīmatu cāḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēśvara dēvavarṣada 4 neya parā
bhavasaṁvatsarada caitra suddha 8 sōmavāradaṁdu viśamahayārūḍhavinutarēvaṁtanuṁ svāmibhakta
numappa saṁkeyasāhaṇi kudureyiṁdiḷidu halageyaḍḍāyiḷavaṁ kaḷadukoṁḍu Ubhayaba
laṁgaḷu nōḍalu kuṁdugoḷada kōṭeyanu seraguberagillade sarigēṟi kādi suralōka prāptanādaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
